data.label: SkiaSharp
data.description: SkiaSharp 是一个基于 Google Skia Graphics Library 的跨平台 2D 图形 API，面向 .NET 平台。它提供完整的 2D API，可在移动端、服务器和桌面模型中用于渲染图像。

data.label: SkiaSharp
data.description: SkiaSharp is a cross-platform 2D graphics API for .NET platforms based on Google's Skia Graphics Library. It provides a comprehensive 2D API that can be used across mobile, server and desktop models to render images.
